notes: GoldSrc/HLDS, same command family as cs16 (verified live). rcon over UDP via the sidecar; maps queried live.

commands.name: change_map
commands.description: Switch to a different map immediately (e.g. ctf_2fort, ctf_well).

commands.name: restart_round
commands.description: Restart the map after a delay in seconds.

commands.name: kick_player
commands.description: Kick a player by name or #userid (see the players query).

commands.name: ban_player
commands.description: Ban a player by userid for N minutes (0 = permanent).

minutes.description: Ban length in minutes; 0 is permanent

userid.description: Numeric userid from the players query

commands.name: say
commands.description: Broadcast a message to everyone on the server.

commands.name: set_join_password
commands.description: Set or clear the join password (empty clears it). Distinct from rcon.

queries.name: players
queries.description: Connected players: userid, name and steamid, plus the current map. Use the userid with kick_player / ban_player.

cvars.name: mp_timelimit
cvars.description: Minutes per map before it changes.

cvars.name: mp_fraglimit
cvars.description: Frags to end the map (0 = none).
